scope: All tenant-local real-time and scheduled reconciliation runs that convert new sources into events or current-state changes.
requiredInputs: TenantContext and system or user principal
new project-local sources since the last successful checkpoint
active project-local tasks, goals, decisions, blockers, and risks
recent project-local meetings and reports when relevant
latest shared, project-local, learned, and manual rules

filters: rule status is active, verified, installed, or reviewable under tenant policy
rule scope includes the current tenant, project, source type, or shared scope
trigger pattern matches the current source, thread, entity, or operation
no exception excludes the current case

failurePolicy.fallback: Suppress irreversible or high-risk automatic mutations, preserve the source, and create a reviewable candidate when an actionable item cannot be safely ignored.

projectResolutionOrder: explicit project relation on the source
participants, topic, and recent task context
projectAndGoalResolution.newGoalSignalBehavior: Propose or create the goal before formalizing its tasks, subject to tenant authorization and evidence gates.
projectAndGoalResolution.unknownProjectOrGoalBehavior: Keep the event or task as candidate, retain evidence, and set clarification_needed.

normalization: preserve dates, amounts, identifiers, and negation
idempotencyAndDeduplication.retryBehavior: Return the previously committed result for the same tenant and idempotency key; never append a duplicate event or transition.

taskMatching.candidatePool: Non-terminal and recently terminal tasks in the same tenant, normally limited to the resolved project.

matchingDimensions.name: same topic thread or source conversation
same requested deliverable or normalized subject
same owner, requester, or involved people
compatible due date or meeting date
shared source, attachment, or linked page

taskMatching.belowManualReviewBehavior: Treat as a possible new event and continue through the new-task gates.

existingTaskUpdateSignals: a promised file or attachment was delivered
a meeting time or attendance was confirmed or changed
a blocker or waiting party was identified
owner, requester, due date, scope, priority, or next step changed
completion, cancellation, rejection, or reopening was reported
an operational check was answered with normal, no adjustment needed, or already handled
newEventSignals: a distinct new subject not represented by an active task
a new financial, HR, legal, tax, safety, or customer risk
a distinct follow-up with a different owner or expected result
suppressionSignals: assistant operation command with no separate real-world action
assistant phonetic or mistyped alias used to list, open, search, or update tasks
pure knowledge sharing that contains no action, unresolved decision, or risk

requirements: no existing task can absorb the event
no separate real-world action was ignored
important but ambiguous match, project, goal, status, or closure
candidate and evidence retained for authorized review

supersession.effectiveProjectionRule: Only the newest supported, non-revoked record in a valid supersession chain is current.

checks: source exists in the same tenant
source locator or relation is auditable
source time and actor are present when available
LINE evidence includes group or conversation, time, sender, content, and media reference when present
meeting evidence includes meeting reference and checkbox or decision text
system suggestions link to underlying source evidence
principal is authorized for the source and target entity

sensitiveActionPolicy.completionBehavior: Set confirmation_status to pending and request project-owner confirmation while retaining completion evidence.

concurrency.conflictBehavior: Reload the current projection and rerun reconciliation with the same tenant and idempotency key.

failurePolicy.sourcePersistenceFailure: Do not acknowledge durable ingestion success; retry through the tenant-local queue policy.
failurePolicy.enrichmentFailure: Retain the raw source, record the error, and retry or route to review without creating unsupported facts.
failurePolicy.schemaValidationFailure: Reject the extraction output, retain the source, and log processor details.
failurePolicy.projectionFailureAfterEventAppend: Retry the idempotent projection step from the event ledger.
failurePolicy.viewPublishFailure: Do not roll back canonical state; retry the tenant-local view outbox.
